core_payload.content:
# Personal AI Assistant

## 1. Role
Personal AI Assistant is the symbiotic carrier surface through which one human speaks to N1Hub, receives graph-grounded explanation, and routes bounded work into deeper execution lanes. It now routes that surface through five bounded sub-hubs so conversation ingress, memory continuity, planning navigation, execution orchestration, and governance control stay explicit instead of collapsing into one overloaded directory.

## 2. Routing Surfaces
- `conversation-ingress` owns graph-grounded conversation, session memory shell, and prompt surfaces that turn operator intent into bounded assistant work.
- `memory-continuity` owns identity, memory, context engineering, and preference surfaces that keep the assistant stable across time.
- `planning-navigation` owns planning, tracking, retrieval, and suggestion surfaces that help the assistant explain what matters now.
- `execution-orchestration` owns delegation, mining, swarm, stewardship, and A2C handoff surfaces that let the assistant move work into deeper lanes without becoming the fleet itself.
- `governance-control` owns wallet, control-plane, review, branch, notification, and integration posture that keep assistant action visible and governable.

## 3. Parent Boundary
The parent assistant hub keeps only the top-level relationship to Workspace, Human-AI Symbiosis, Key Agents, CapsuleOS, To Dig Deep, and the five sub-hubs. Detailed routing now flows through the sub-hubs so the assistant remains the carrier contract for one stable partner surface instead of a flat registry of every adjacent module.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Personal AI Assistant now acts as a bounded routing hub instead of a flat dependency directory. It keeps only top-level ties to Workspace, Human-AI Symbiosis, Key Agents, CapsuleOS, To Dig Deep, and five assistant sub-hubs covering conversation ingress, memory continuity, planning navigation, execution orchestration, and governance control. This makes the assistant easier to inspect, extend, and govern without diluting its role as the user-facing symbiotic carrier surface for the wider N1Hub intelligence system.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: The real assistant capsule now explicitly owns the current N1 carrier contract, bounded routing posture, and human-governed escalation law. Dream remains valid as future assistant doctrine, but it should no longer be read as the canonical statement of live assistant behavior.
Refactored Personal AI Assistant into five bounded sub-hubs so conversation, continuity, planning, orchestration, and governance routing no longer collapse into a 42-link parent hub.
